# Caffeinated

> Mobile coffee bar for corporate events, weddings, and private functions in Houston, TX.

## About

Caffeinated is a mobile coffee bar based in Houston, Texas. We bring a full coffee bar setup to corporate events, weddings, and private functions across the Houston metro area. Every booking includes a professional barista, all drinks and supplies, setup and teardown, and travel. You don't need to provide anything.

## Services and Pricing

- **The Standard** ($499 starting): Professional barista, full coffee bar setup, 2 hours of service, up to 75 drinks, classic drink menu, all supplies included, setup and teardown handled.
- **The Full Spread** ($899 starting): Everything in The Standard plus 3 hours of service, up to 150 drinks, custom drink menu for your event, and branded cups with your logo.
- **The VIP** ($1,499 starting): Everything in The Full Spread plus 4 hours of service, unlimited drinks, styled cart setup to match your event, and social media content from the event.

All packages include setup, teardown, all supplies, and travel anywhere in the Houston metro area. Custom packages available for recurring bookings and large events.

## Menu

- Cold Brews: Salted Caramel, Brown Sugar Vanilla, Churro, Maple Vanilla, Spanish
- Chai Lattes: Vanilla Cinnamon, Spanish Chai
- Matcha Lattes: Maple, Strawberry, Mango
- Refreshers: Strawberry Lemonade, Mango Passionfruit

12 handcrafted drinks total. All served from our mobile coffee bar.

## What's Included in Every Booking

- Professional barista (trained, friendly, serves 60-80 drinks per hour)
- Full mobile coffee bar setup (indoor or outdoor)
- All drinks and supplies (coffee, milks, cups, lids, napkins, stirrers)
- Setup and teardown (we arrive early, set up, serve, clean up, and leave)
- Travel anywhere in the Houston metro area
- Coordination support (we handle the logistics)

## Service Area

Houston, The Woodlands, Katy, Sugar Land, Pearland, Clear Lake, Downtown Houston, Midtown, The Heights, Galleria/Uptown, Memorial, Energy Corridor, Cypress, Spring, Rice Village/Museum District, Montrose, and the entire Houston metro area. Travel is included in all packages.

## Contact

- Website: https://caffeinated.com
- Email: hello@caffeinatedhtx.com
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/caffeinated
- TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@caffeinated

## What Makes Us Different

Caffeinated is built to be the easiest vendor you've ever booked. From finding us online to getting a quote to the day of your event, every step is fast, professional, and handled for you. We respond to quote requests within 2 hours. We bring everything. We set up. We serve great coffee. We clean up. You focus on your event.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: How far in advance should I book?**
A: We recommend booking at least 2-3 weeks out, but we can sometimes accommodate shorter timelines. For peak season (October through December), book as early as possible. Those dates fill up fast.

**Q: What's included in every package?**
A: Every package includes a professional barista, our full coffee cart setup, all drinks and supplies (cups, lids, napkins, stirrers), setup and teardown, and travel anywhere in the Houston metro area. You don't need to provide anything.

**Q: Can I customize the drink menu?**
A: Yes. Our Full Spread and VIP packages include a custom menu tailored to your event. Seasonal specials, signature drinks with custom names, or specific milk options are all available.

**Q: Do you serve areas outside Houston?**
A: We cover the entire Houston metro area, including Katy, Sugar Land, The Woodlands, Pearland, Clear Lake, and everywhere in between. Travel is included in all packages. For events outside the metro, reach out and we'll make it work.

**Q: How many drinks can you serve per hour?**
A: Our baristas serve approximately 60-80 drinks per hour. For larger events, we can add additional baristas to keep the line moving.

**Q: What if I'm not sure which package I need?**
A: Tell us your event type, guest count, and date. We'll recommend the right package and put together a custom quote.
